diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: ME/CFS post-viral (EBV) exacerbation with post-exertional malaise
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Recurrent immune-type sore throat is a recognised ME/CFS flare feature when identical to prior episodes.
Severe sore throat mandates active exclusion of quinsy, which chat cannot visualise.
Compatible but non-specific; recurrent post-exertional pattern argues against a new bacterial cause.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: ME/CFS post-viral (EBV) exacerbation with post-exertional malaise
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Bilateral tender nodes recur with EBV-onset ME/CFS flares; bilaterality argues against a localised abscess.
Cervical lymphadenopathy is characteristic of EBV mononucleosis.
Bilateral, symmetric node tenderness is less typical of a unilateral peritonsillar collection.

symptoms.symptom_name: Profound post-exertional malaise / collapse triggered by a minor stressor

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: ME/CFS post-viral (EBV) exacerbation with post-exertional malaise
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Disproportionate, delayed multi-system crash after a minor trigger (PEM) is the cardinal feature of ME/CFS.
The collapse is out of proportion to and distinct from an airway-obstruction picture.

symptoms.symptom_name: Recurrent identical crashes since acute EBV glandular fever

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: ME/CFS post-viral (EBV) exacerbation with post-exertional malaise
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: An established post-EBV course with recurrent identical flares strongly raises the prior for a benign recurrent flare over a new emergency.

symptoms.symptom_name: Odynophagia with reduced oral fluid intake (dehydration risk)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Dehydration secondary to reduced oral intake
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Painful swallowing directly reduces intake — the principal modifiable acute risk in this presentation.
Severe odynophagia is one driver to actively exclude a peritonsillar collection.

symptoms.symptom_name: Weak whisper voice due to energy conservation (not a muffled hot-potato voice)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A weak-from-exhaustion whisper without a muffled 'hot-potato' quality argues against quinsy/epiglottitis.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: ME/CFS post-viral (EBV) exacerbation with post-exertional malaise
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Speaking faintly to conserve energy is consistent with a profound post-exertional crash.

symptoms.symptom_name: No high fever, no rigors, no rapidly spreading/asymmetric neck swelling

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of high fever and exudate lowers the probability of a new bacterial tonsillitis.
No rapidly spreading or markedly asymmetric swelling reduces (but does not exclude) a peritonsillar collection.

symptoms.symptom_name: Airway currently patent — no drooling, swallows saliva, no stridor, no trismus

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Ability to swallow saliva without drooling or stridor makes acute airway obstruction unlikely at present.
No trismus or muffled voice lowers the probability of quinsy, though chat cannot exclude it.

symptoms.symptom_name: Oropharynx: mild bilateral tonsillar erythema without exudate; no peritonsillar swelling or uvular deviation; airway patent (in-home examination)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Direct visualisation of a symmetric oropharynx without peritonsillar swelling/uvular deviation is what excludes quinsy — sealed clinician finding the AI Doctor cannot obtain.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: ME/CFS post-viral (EBV) exacerbation with post-exertional malaise
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Only mild erythema without exudate is consistent with a benign immune-type flare rather than a suppurative infection.

symptoms.symptom_name: Stable haemodynamics and afebrile on in-home measurement (BP 105/65, HR 95, RR 16, SpO2 99%, Temp 37.3)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Dehydration secondary to reduced oral intake
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Normal BP/HR and mild tachycardia only argue against significant hypovolaemia at the time measured — but these values are sealed and unobtainable via chat.
Normal SpO2 and no respiratory distress argue against airway compromise at the measured time; not available to the AI Doctor.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: ME/CFS post-viral (EBV) exacerbation with post-exertional malaise
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Individually non-specific, but recurrent sore throat + bilateral tender nodes + disproportionate post-exertional collapse + an established post-EBV course together strongly identify a benign recurrent ME/CFS flare rather than a new emergency.

Swallowing saliva without drooling/stridor and a weak-not-muffled voice together make current airway obstruction unlikely — but the AI Doctor must still safety-net because it cannot visualise the oropharynx.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms/monitors the post-EBV course but does not change the acute telehealth disposition; arrange via GP, not urgently.
A mononucleosis-like pharyngitis with lymphadenopathy warrants HIV serology to exclude seroconversion; arrange through the GP, not tonight.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: In-person oropharyngeal examination / ENT review if airway or abscess features appear
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The definitive exclusion of quinsy/epiglottitis requires visualising the throat — same-day in-person review if any airway red flag or trismus/spreading swelling develops.
Not indicated as a first step from telehealth with a currently safe airway and a negative red-flag screen — over-investigation.
